articles.headline: Manchester United vs. Liverpool in Premier League: TV channel, kick-off time, live stream, referee, injury and team news
articles.description: Everything you need to know about Manchester United vs Liverpool in the Premier League, including five key talking points.

articles.headline: Mikel Arteta: Bayern, PSG competing in 'different worlds' to Arsenal
articles.description: Arsenal manager Mikel Arteta said his side were teams competing in "different worlds" domestically to Bayern Munich and Paris Saint-Germain.

articles.headline: 'Unbelievable feeling': Leeds close in on Premier league survival
articles.description: Dominic Calvert-Lewin savored the "unbelievable feeling" as he helped Leeds United take a massive step towards confirming their Premier League status with a 3-1 victory over Burnley on Friday.

articles.headline: Leeds on verge of Premier League safety after beating Burnley
articles.description: Leeds United bounced back from their Wembley disappointment by beating already-relegated Burnley 3-1 at Elland Road to take another giant step towards Premier League safety.

articles.headline: Arsenal's Mikel Arteta: Premier League should help teams competing in Europe
articles.description: Mikel Arteta has said the Premier League should provide more help to English teams in Europe but vowed Arsenal will learn from past lessons when facing Fulham.

articles.headline: Papers: Liverpool weighing up summer swoop for Barcola
articles.description: The top stories and transfer rumours from Saturday's newspapers...

articles.headline: Michael Carrick: Kobbie Mainoo has impressed me since I joined Man United
articles.description: Manchester United caretaker manager Michael Carrick has praised Kobbie Mainoo's performance since he's been at the club.

articles.headline: Transfer rumors, news: Liverpool eye Conceição as Salah replacement
articles.description: Liverpool are reportedly looking at Juventus' Francisco Conceição as a potential Mohamed Salah replacement. Transfer Talk has the latest.

articles.headline: Arsenal vs Fulham: TV channel, kick-off time, live stream, referee, injury and team news
articles.description: All you need to know ahead of Saturday's Premier League clash between Arsenal and Fulham.

articles.headline: Tottenham's Antonín Kinsky: Atlético nightmare made me stronger
articles.description: Tottenham Hotspur goalkeeper Antonín Kinsky has said that he is a stronger player after enduring Champions League nightmare against Altético Madrid.

articles.headline: Aston Villa vs Tottenham in Premier League: TV channel, kick-off time, live stream, referee, injury and team news
articles.description: Everything you need to know about Aston Villa vs Tottenham in the Premier League, including key talking points.

articles.headline: Roberto De Zerbi urges the Tottenham players to block out the 'negatiivity'
articles.description: Tottenham head coach Roberto De Zerbi has urged his players to block out external negativity.

articles.headline: Callum McFarlane: Chelsea can still achieve Champions League football this season
articles.description: Chelsea Interim head coach Callum McFarlane believes his side still have many things to play for this season.

articles.headline: Mikel Arteta: Arsenal fans need to be positive and behind the players vs. Fulham
articles.description: Arsenal manager Mikel Arteta believes home advantage will be key for them when they face Fulham in the Premier League.

articles.headline: Calum McFarlane: Reece James and Levi Colwill closing in on Chelsea returns
articles.description: Reece James and Levi Colwill could return to Chelsea's squad for Monday's meeting with Nottingham Forest, interim head coach Calum McFarlane has revealed.

articles.headline: 'I watched you' - Tottenham's Roberto De Zerbi challenges press negativity
articles.description: Roberto De Zerbi has warned Tottenham's relegation rivals not to count them out and promised there will be no crying at the club over more injury problems this season.

articles.headline: Why Pep chose to watch Stockport County over PSG vs. Bayern Munich
articles.description: Pep Guardiola laughs in his press conference when asked about PSG's nine-goal thriller with Bayern Munich in the Champions League.

articles.headline: Carrick: Man United vs. Liverpool still a standout game even if neither challenging for PL title
articles.description: Manchester United against Liverpool is still a "stand out" game in English football, according to Michael Carrick, despite neither team challenging for the title this season.

articles.headline: Man City's Pep Guardiola on fixture congestion: 'It is what it is'
articles.description: Pep Guardiola has played down Manchester City's frustrations over fixture rescheduling during their domestic treble push.

articles.headline: Slot confirms Salah will return this season
articles.description: Arne Slot provides an update on Mohamed Salah's fitness after his injury against Crystal Palace.

articles.headline: Darke: More twists to come in Arsenal, Man City title race
articles.description: Pep Guardiola and Man City are in better form, but Arsenal aren't out of the title race yet as Ian Darke predicts one or two more twists in the plot yet.

articles.headline: Marco Silva calls on Fulham to stall Arsenal's title bid
articles.description: Marco Silva hopes Fulham can capitalise on potential nerves and anxiety inside Emirates Stadium during Saturday's visit to table-topping Arsenal.

articles.headline: Man United exploring all permanent manager options with Michael Carrick leading race - sources
articles.description: Manchester United are determined to explore all of their options before appointing their next permanent head coach despite caretaker boss Michael Carrick leading the race to get the job full-time, sources have told ESPN.

articles.headline: Wayne Rooney: Age has gotten to Mo Salah and Virgil van Dijk
articles.description: Wayne Rooney believes that Mohamed Salah and Virgil van Dijk are starting to succumb to father time, saying that "age gets to us all" in relation to the experienced Liverpool duo.

articles.headline: Liverpool's Arne Slot relieved that Mohamed Salah will return before end of season
articles.description: Arne Slot has said it is a "big relief" that Mohamed Salah will be able to play for Liverpool again this season after scans revealed the forward's muscle injury is only minor.

articles.headline: Could Bruno Fernandes break long-standing Premier League assist record?
articles.description: Bruno Fernandes is on the verge of equalling the record for the most assists registered in a single Premier League season.

articles.headline: The earliest dates Arsenal or Man City could win the Premier League title
articles.description: The Premier League title race between Manchester City and Arsenal is set to go right down to the wire. But when could either side win it earliest?

articles.headline: Are Newcastle really in danger of being relegated from Premier League this season?
articles.description: Newcastle's poor run of form, and the results of their nearest rivals, has them in danger of getting sucked into the relegation conversation - are they safe from the drop?

articles.headline: What must happen for Man United to secure Champions League spot?
articles.description: Manchester United are on the verge of returning to the Champions League after a significant win over Brentford on Monday.

articles.headline: Premier League players out of contract: Who could leave your team on a free this summer?
articles.description: ESPN takes a look at the players who are out of contract in 2026 across all 20 Premier League clubs.

articles.headline: Arsenal and Man City's remaining Premier League fixtures compared as title race hots up
articles.description: The Premier League title race is well and truly underway with Arsenal being chased down by Pep Guardiola's Manchester City in their hunt for a first top-flight trophy since 2004.
